FX.title: USD/JPY on the Brink: NFP and Geopolitics Drive 160-Breakout
tldr_points: Strong March NFP (+178K vs +60K expected) reinforces USD dominance
Iran Hormuz opening threatens oil prices, adding volatility to USD/JPY
Technical confluence suggests high probability of 160-level breakout
FX.excerpt: Strong NFP and Iran developments set stage for USD/JPY to test 160. Key resistance now critical.
FX.comment: Breakout confirmed by NFP-driven USD strength and technical momentum above 160

STOCKS.title: S&P 500: Institutional Analysis Reveals Bullish Divergence Amid Macro Uncertainty
tldr_points: Trump-related fiscal risks in 2026 priced in
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 technicals show bullish momentum despite macro headwinds. Key resistance at 5030.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish breakout confirmed above MA20 with RSI divergence; high-reliability setup.

CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD exhibits heightened volatility linked to macroeconomic shifts.
